title: Exact Finite Module Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite module bad submodule QF_UF/Alethe regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Submodule scalar-closure conflict where 1 is present, 2*1 = 2, and 2 is absent while the malformed row demands scalar closure.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite module rows only when they add distinct scalar-closure, quotient, or homomorphism solver pressure; keep exact sequences, projective/injective modules, and homological algebra in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed finite module tables as deterministic finite-function and equality obligations.
Replay submodule, generated-submodule, module-homomorphism, kernel, image, and quotient-module witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Route bad finite submodule scalar-closure conflicts through checked QF_UF/Alethe evidence once exact evaluation replay identifies the failing scalar product.
Keep general module theory, exact sequences, tensor products, projective/injective modules, and homological algebra under Lean horizon until formal routes exist.
